name: Qinghai Spring Medicinal Resources Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Qinghai Spring Medicinal Resources Technology Co., Ltd. explores and develops natural medicinal resources on the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau. It provides polar and Herborist grass 5X cordyceps sinensis series of products, and cordyceps sinensis pure powder tablets. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Xining, China.
